title: Epicycas siamensis
taxonomy: Epicycas siamensis is a species of frog in the family Dicroglossidae. It is native to Thailand and was previously known as the Microhyla fissipes. The taxonomy and classification of Epicycas siamensis have been subject to revision, and its exact classification within the Dicroglossidae family is still being studied. Epicycas siamensis is a relatively newly described species, and further research is needed to fully understand its classification. The classification of Epicycas siamensis is often found within the subfamily Microhylini.
